name: Washing Machine – Circular Burst Promo Flyer
svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" viewBox="0 0 1080 1350" width="1080" height="1350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="wm-bg" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1350" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_TOP"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_BOTTOM"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="wm-cta" x1="486" y1="0" x2="1080" y2="0" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT_ALT"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <radialGradient id="wm-circle-glow" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="50%">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stop-opacity="0.08"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stop-opacity="0"/>
    </radialGradient>
    <clipPath id="wm-img-clip">
      <circle cx="540" cy="486" r="368"/>
    </clipPath>
  </defs>

  <!-- LAYER 1: warm off-white background -->
  <rect width="1080" height="1350" fill="url(#wm-bg)"/>

  <!-- LAYER 2: subtle diagonal bg stripes -->
  <polygon points="0,0 220,0 0,480"        fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" fill-opacity="0.04"/>
  <polygon points="1080,0 1080,580 860,0"  fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.06"/>

  <!-- LAYER 3: outer decorative dashed ring -->
  <circle cx="540" cy="486" r="470" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="0.8" stroke-opacity="0.1" stroke-dasharray="6 10"/>

  <!-- LAYER 4: outer solid ring -->
  <circle cx="540" cy="486" r="440" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="1" stroke-opacity="0.08"/>

  <!-- LAYER 5: main circle — dark fill -->
  <circle cx="540" cy="486" r="400" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK"/>

  <!-- LAYER 6: circle inner glow -->
  <circle cx="540" cy="486" r="400" fill="url(#wm-circle-glow)"/>

  <!-- LAYER 7: product image clipped to inner circle -->
  <g clip-path="url(#wm-img-clip)">
    <image href="PLACEHOLDER_PRODUCT_IMAGE" x="172" y="118" width="736" height="736" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet"/>
  </g>

  <!-- LAYER 8: circle accent border ring -->
  <circle cx="540" cy="486" r="400" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-opacity="0.25"/>

  <!-- LAYER 9: circular store name text — top arc -->
  <path id="wm-top-arc" d="M 120,486 A 420,420 0 0,1 960,486" fill="none"/>
  <text font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="18" font-weight="500" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" fill-opacity="0.55" letter-spacing="12">
    <textPath href="#wm-top-arc" startOffset="8%">PLACEHOLDER_CIRCLE_TOP_TEXT</textPath>
  </text>

  <!-- LAYER 10: circular url text — bottom arc -->
  <path id="wm-bot-arc" d="M 120,486 A 420,420 0 0,0 960,486" fill="none"/>
  <text font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="16" font-weight="400" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.7" letter-spacing="10">
    <textPath href="#wm-bot-arc" startOffset="18%">PLACEHOLDER_CIRCLE_BOT_TEXT</textPath>
  </text>

  <!-- LAYER 11: cardinal tick marks -->
  <line x1="540" y1="60"  x2="540" y2="82"  stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.2"/>
  <line x1="540" y1="890" x2="540" y2="912" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.2"/>
  <line x1="96"  y1="486" x2="118" y2="486" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.2"/>
  <line x1="962" y1="486" x2="984" y2="486" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.2"/>

  <!-- LAYER 12: accent dot at top of circle -->
  <circle cx="540" cy="72" r="5" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT"/>

  <!-- LAYER 13: left spec callout 1 -->
  <line x1="148" y1="360" x2="54" y2="330" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.2"/>
  <text x="48" y="316" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="11" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" fill-opacity="0.4" letter-spacing="2" text-anchor="end">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC1_LABEL</text>
  <text x="48" y="340" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="28" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" text-anchor="end">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC1_VALUE</text>

  <!-- LAYER 14: left spec callout 2 -->
  <line x1="148" y1="620" x2="54" y2="650" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.2"/>
  <text x="48" y="636" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="11" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" fill-opacity="0.4" letter-spacing="2" text-anchor="end">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC2_LABEL</text>
  <text x="48" y="660" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="28" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" text-anchor="end">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC2_VALUE</text>

  <!-- LAYER 15: right spec callout 1 -->
  <line x1="932" y1="360" x2="1026" y2="330" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.2"/>
  <text x="1032" y="316" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="11" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" fill-opacity="0.4" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC3_LABEL</text>
  <text x="1032" y="340" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="28" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC3_VALUE</text>

  <!-- LAYER 16: right spec callout 2 -->
  <line x1="932" y1="620" x2="1026" y2="650" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.2"/>
  <text x="1032" y="636" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="11" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" fill-opacity="0.4" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC4_LABEL</text>
  <text x="1032" y="660" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="28" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC4_VALUE</text>

  <!-- LAYER 17: product name large -->
  <text x="30" y="1006" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="118" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" letter-spacing="-2">PLACEHOLDER_TITLE_LINE1</text>
  <text x="30" y="1116" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="118" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" letter-spacing="-2">PLACEHOLDER_TITLE_LINE2</text>

  <!-- LAYER 18: model + tagline right -->
  <text x="1050" y="1010" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="300" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" fill-opacity="0.4" text-anchor="end" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_MODEL_TEXT</text>
  <text x="1050" y="1038" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="300" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" fill-opacity="0.4" text-anchor="end" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_TAGLINE_LINE1</text>
  <text x="1050" y="1066" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="300" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" fill-opacity="0.4" text-anchor="end" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_TAGLINE_LINE2</text>

  <!-- LAYER 19: horizontal rule -->
  <line x1="30" y1="1132" x2="1050" y2="1132" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.12"/>

  <!-- LAYER 20: price block — left dark tile -->
  <rect x="0" y="1148" width="480" height="130" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK"/>
  <text x="30" y="1196" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif"    font-size="13" font-weight="400" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.4" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_PRICE_LABEL</text>
  <text x="30" y="1262" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="72" fill="#FFFFFF" letter-spacing="-2">PLACEHOLDER_PRICE_VALUE</text>

  <!-- LAYER 21: orange divider bar -->
  <rect x="480" y="1148" width="6" height="130" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT"/>

  <!-- LAYER 22: CTA block — right accent tile -->
  <rect x="486" y="1148" width="594" height="130" fill="url(#wm-cta)"/>
  <text x="783" y="1204" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="52" fill="#FFFFFF" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_CTA_LINE1</text>
  <text x="783" y="1264" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="52" fill="#FFFFFF" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_CTA_LINE2</text>

  <!-- LAYER 23: footer strip -->
  <rect x="0" y="1278" width="1080" height="72" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" fill-opacity="0.05"/>
  <line x1="0" y1="1278" x2="1080" y2="1278" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.1"/>
  <text x="540" y="1320" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="300" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_DARK" fill-opacity="0.35" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_FOOTER_TEXT</text>
</svg>
